# Rails Agent Skills

> A curated library of 28 executable skill files and 9 orchestrating agents that turn AI coding assistants into disciplined Rails developers who follow conventions, write tests first, and ship production-quality code.

Each skill lives in `skills/<category>/<name>/SKILL.md` and follows a consistent template: YAML frontmatter, Quick Reference, HARD-GATE (non-negotiable rules), Core Process (step-by-step instructions), Output Quality (graded checklist), Extended Resources (progressive disclosure), and Integration (next skill to chain).

Agents live in `agents/<name>/SKILL.md` and orchestrate multiple skills into complete development loops. The TDD agent chains: load-context → plan-tests → write-tests → implement → code-review → PR.

## Skill Categories

- **Testing (3)**: write-tests, test-service, plan-tests
- **Code Quality (6)**: code-review, review-architecture, security-check, apply-conventions, implement-authorization, refactor-code
- **Engines (8)**: create, test, review, release, document, install, extract, upgrade
- **Infrastructure (5)**: review-migration, implement-background-job, seed-database, optimize-performance, version-api, implement-hotwire
- **API (2)**: generate-api-collection, implement-graphql
- **Context (2)**: load-context, setup-environment

Plus 15 shared skills from ruby-core-skills for YARD docs, DDD, service objects, and process discipline.

## Agents (9)

TDD, Review, Quality, Engine, Bug Fix, GraphQL, Migration, Background Job, Setup

## Core Rule

Every code-producing skill enforces a HARD-GATE: no implementation code until a failing test proves the feature is missing. The TDD sequence: Write test → Run test → Verify it FAILS for the right reason → Implement → Verify it PASSES.

## Context Engineering

Uses lean-ctx for compressed, cached file access with 10 read modes (map, signatures, aggressive, entropy). Replaces raw file reads with token-efficient alternatives, reducing context usage by 50-80%.

## Ecosystem

Part of a six-repo composable skill ecosystem with automatic dependency resolution via agent-mcp-runtime. Connected repos: ruby-core-skills, hanakai-yaku, agnostic-planning-skills, agent-mcp-runtime, ruby-skill-bench.

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/igmarin/rails-agent-skills)
- Install: `npx skills add igmarin/rails-agent-skills` or `gh skill install igmarin/rails-agent-skills`
